name: Kushina uzumaki
description:
Kushina needs some Fuiinjutsu formulas to help her husband Minato who is about to embark in suicidal mission, She will do anything to protect her husband even if it is having sex with an old suitor heavily endorsed by her grand aunt Mito.
(I seriously think she's the best female character in naruto)
